Stack Now
AI-oracle _
Oracle connected to all market data. Predict impact of events. Predict price moves and narratives. Predict chain rotations and airdrop events. No limits.
oBSERVERS & PREDICTORS
Revolutionary custom-tuned AI & ML model
Observers
The listeners. On watch for all information sources, news, market prices, liquidity information, on-chain and off-chain price moves, market events and upcoming events. 
Predictors
The workers. After receiving a request, news, alert or update, our proprietary models label, analyze and score the received data.
As simple as 'Why'
Get access to Oracle through multiple ways.
News squawk
Real time aggregated news feed and impact predictions for each. 
Chat with Oracle
Chat with Oracle, ask it questions about the current market situation, edge or alpha.
Self-Browse reports
Intraday sentiment reports covering updates on all our news & sentiment data. Oracle communicates on its own. Full market coverage

Real time aggregated news feed and impact predictions for each. 
Chat with Oracle
Chat with Oracle, ask it questions about the current market situation, edge or alpha.
Self-Browse reports
Intraday sentiment reports covering updates on all our news & sentiment data. Oracle communicates on its own. Full market coverage.
As complete as ‘How’
How our Observer and Predictor systems interact
Massive intelligence input.
One output. All-in-one.

Real time news feed

News impact predictions

Keep track of all important news headlines in the market. Our models are trained to provide impact predictions for each news headline.

Social activity impact

Social activity impact

Cross social platform activity trackers. Real time analytics for social activity.

Intraday sentiment reports

Intraday sentiment reports

Timed sentiment reports based on all recently gathered data.

Trend Recognition

Trend Recognition

Predictors are trained to recognise trends and stay up to date with the current trends in the market.

Full Market Coverage

Full Market Coverage

We strive to one day reach full market data coverage. More tools will be announced soon.
